compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward and forward bulk and flag features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and cardinality ratios near 1e-05, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

notes: partition-level observation of low cardinality features

compressed_regions.summary: Several feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation (correlation=1 or 0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies and potential redundancy.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: strong linear dependencies observed across multiple feature pairs

compressed_regions.summary: Several packet length and size features show substantial class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Average Packet Size|Avg Bwd Segment Size
notes: features related to packet length and size statistics

compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong distributional differences between BENIGN and DDoS classes with high dominant ratio in DDoS and substantial Jensen-Shannon divergence.

notes: feature distribution varies strongly by class

compressed_regions.summary: Partition overview reports moderate class imbalance and presence of duplicated rows, which may influence feature distributions and model behavior.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Backward and forward PSH and URG flags show near-constant values with unique_values=1 and very low cardinality ratios.

locality.scope_value: Bwd PSH Flags|Bwd URG Flags|Fwd URG Flags

preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: Low cardinality flags may represent stable but potentially uninformative signals that could influence model behavior.

preserved_weak_signals.descriptor: Bwd Packet Length Mean is the top-ranked feature in the partition overview and shows strong dependency with Avg Bwd Segment Size.
preserved_weak_signals.preservation_reason: High rank and strong dependency suggest this feature is structurally important but may also be redundant.

unresolved_tensions.description: Tension between features exhibiting near-constant values (low cardinality) and other features showing strong class-conditioned structural variation.
Tension between strong feature dependencies indicating redundancy and high feature ranking suggesting importance.
